text_blocks.text: Data compression can be viewed as a
special case of data differenting: Data
difference given a source and a target, with
patching producing a target given a source
and a difference, while data compression
consists of producing a compressed file
given a target, and decompression consists of
producing a target given only a compressed file.
Thus, one can consider data compression as
data differenting with empty source data, the
from nothing." This is the same as considering
compression) as a special case of relative
